subcodes.first_line: Remember thou My handmaiden who was drawn by My verses, who turned towards Mine horizon, who soared in Mine atmosphere and quaffed the pure wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری امتی التی انجذبت من آیاتی و اقبلت الی افقی و طارت فی هوائی و شربت رحیق
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
